log.context:
Service restarted cleanly on port 8110. Walkers will take ~10 seconds to spawn the first one. Everything is working.

---

**Summary of findings and fixes:**

**Root cause:** After system restarts, `persona-audition.service` was crash-looping at startup because the code had a hardcoded default of port `8101` (the same port as `labs-diff-narrator`). The `Environment=PORT=8110` in the systemd unit file was resolving correctly after ~8 retries (~40 seconds), after which it would run fine. But durin...(truncated)
